node.content-desc: PROGRAM INTELLIGENCE, Log 2-3 workouts to unlock smarter recommendations, Suggested Intensity: Moderate, Reason: Need more history to model adherence, recovery, and progression., Insight: Need at least a few completed sessions before IronLog can judge your split or volume.

node.text: Reason: Need more history to model adherence, recovery, and progression.
Insight: Need at least a few completed sessions before IronLog can judge your split or volume.

node.content-desc: MUSCLE RECOVERY, TAP TO EXPAND →, FRONT, BACK, < 60%, 60–82%, > 82%, Unknown
